name: Archery
description: Reworks Archery for the New Ranged package. Basic / Advanced / Expert Archery improve ranged damage by 15% / 25% / 50%, increase total ammo pool by 1 / 2 / 3 shots, and from Advanced onward extend full-damage shooting range by 1 hex, up to 11 hexes. Expert Archery also makes ranged attacks inflict Basic Forgetfulness on the target. With Artillery, Ballista and Cannon can receive matching Archery bonuses based on both skill levels.
author: bew_
